variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14517 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14517 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14517 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson R800103 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14517
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4567 Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14517
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4567 air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
